```
    43	
    44	  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedGridContainerNode): GridEditNode {
    45	    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedGridEditNode
    46	    const cols = serializedNode.cols || 2
    47	    const rawGap = legacy.gap
    48	    const gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : rawGap
    49	    const node = new GridEditNode(cols, gap)

    53	        const editor = createCellEditor()
    54	        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(cellState)
    55	        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
    56	        return editor
    57	      })
    58	      node.__cellEditors = editors
    59	    } else if (legacy.children) {
    60	      const {children} = legacy
    61	      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = children.map((child) => {
    62	        const editor = createCellEditor()
    63	        const content = {
    64	          root: {
    65	            children: [child],
    66	            direction: null,
    67	            format: '',

    69	            type: 'root',
    70	            version: 1,

    72	        } as unknown as SerializedEditorState

    79
```

```
     9	export interface TabsRendererProps {

    13	export function TabsRenderer({ tabs }: TabsRendererProps) {
    14	  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
    15	  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    16	  const rendererConfig = useRendererConfig()
    17	
    18	  const tabRefs = useRef<Map<string, HTMLButtonElement>>(new Map())
    19	  const listRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    20	  const [indicator, setIndicator] = useState({ left: 0, width: 0 })
    21	
    22	  const updateIndicator = useCallback(() => {
    23	    const el = tabRefs.current.get(activeTab)
    24	    const list = listRef.current
    25	    if (el && list) {
    26	      const listRect = list.getBoundingClientRect()
    27	      const tabRect = el.getBoundingClientRect()
    28	      setIndicator({
    29	        left: tabRect.left - listRect.left,
    30	        width: tabRect.width,
    31	      })
    32	    }
    33	  }, [activeTab])
    34	
    35	  useEffect(() => {
    36	    updateIndicator()
    37	  }, [updateIndicator])
    38	
    39	  useEffect(() => {
    40	    const list = listRef.current
    41	    if (!list) return
    42	    const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => updateIndicator())
    43	    observer.observe(list)
    44	    return () => observer.disconnect()
    45	  }, [updateIndicator])
    46	
    47	  useEffect(() => {
    48	    if (tabs.length === 0) return
    49	    if (tabs.some((tab) => tab.label === activeTab)) return
    50	    setActiveTab(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
    51	  }, [activeTab, tabs])
    52	
    53	  if (tabs.length === 0) return null
    54	
    55	  return (

    59	      onValueChange={setActiveTab}

    66	              value={tab.label}

    70	                else tabRefs.current.delete(tab.label)

    72	            >
    73	              {tab.label}
    74	            </Tabs.Tab>
    75	          ))}
```

```
    51	    nodes,

    55	    },
    56	    ...(initialValue ? { editorState: JSON.stringify(initialValue) } : {}),
    57	  }
    58	
    59	  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
    60	
    61	  return (
    62	    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
    63	      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
    64	        <RendererConfigProvider config={rendererConfig} mode="editor">
    65	          <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
    66	            <div className={clsx('rich-editor', variantClass, className)}>
    67	              <RichTextPlugin
    68	                contentEditable={
    69	                  <ContentEditable
    70	                    className={contentClassName}
    71	                    placeholder={placeholder}
    72	                  />
    73	                }
    74	                ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}

    76	              <HistoryPlugin />

    78	              <LinkPlugin />
    79	              <TabIndentationPlugin />
    80	              <TablePlugin />
    81	              <MarkdownShortcutsPlugin />
    82	              <OnChangePlugin onChange={onChange} debounceMs={debounceMs} />
    83	              <SubmitShortcutPlugin onSubmit={onSubmit} />
    84	              <ImagePlugin />
    85	              <KaTeXPlugin />
    86	              <AlertPlugin />
    87	              <MermaidPlugin />
    88	              <ComponentPlugin />
    89	              <AutoLinkPlugin />
    90	              <EditorRefPlugin onEditorReady={onEditorReady} />
    91	              {autoFocus && <AutoFocusPlugin />}
    92	              {children}
    93	              {actions && <div className="rich-editor__actions">{actions}</div>}
    94	            </div>
    95	          </LexicalComposer>
    96	        </RendererConfigProvider>
    97	      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    98	    </PortalThemeProvider>
```

```
export function getStateAttributesProps(state, customMapping) {
  const props = {};

  /* eslint-disable-next-line guard-for-in */
  for (const key in state) {
    const value = state[key];
    if (customMapping?.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
      const customProps = customMapping[key](value);
      if (customProps != null) {
        Object.assign(props, customProps);
      }
      continue;
    }
    if (value === true) {
      props[`data-${key.toLowerCase()}`] = '';
    } else if (value) {
      props[`data-${key.toLowerCase()}`] = value.toString();
    }
  }
  return props;
}
```
</details></tool-use>

```
    id,

  const {
    ref: listItemRef,
    index
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 16:18:18Z)**_

**Findings**
1. High: lockfile is out of sync after removing `motion` from `packages/rich-editor/package.json` (dependency sections around `packages/rich-editor/package.json:20` and `packages/rich-editor/package.json:47`), but it is still present in the importer snapshot at `pnpm-lock.yaml:539`. This can fail installs with frozen lockfile.
2. Medium: active tab styling selector likely does not match Base UI Tabs state attributes. CSS uses `data-selected` at `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts:781`, while Base UI Tabs tab data attributes define active as `data-active` at `packages/rich-editor/node_modules/@base-ui/react/esm/tabs/tab/TabsTabDataAttributes.d.ts:19`. Result: active label color may not apply.
3. Medium: potential responsive regression in tabs list layout. `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts:756` uses `display: flex` with fixed `gap: 1.5em` and no wrap/overflow strategy, so many/long tab labels can overflow on narrow widths.
4. Low: indicator recalculation is tied to active-tab changes and list resize (`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/TabsRenderer.tsx:22`, `packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/TabsRenderer.tsx:39`). If tab metrics change without list resize, indicator position/width can become stale.

**Open Questions / Assumptions**
1. Assumed CI uses `pnpm` with frozen lockfile checks.
2. Assumed tabs should remain robust on smaller widths with longer labels.

**Notes**
1. I ran `pnpm -C packages/rich-editor exec tsc --noEmit`; it fails due pre-existing type errors in `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:29` and `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts:18` (not introduced by this diff).
